final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen smartphone advertisement mockup for OPPO Find X9 Ultra new product launch, designed as a brand-exposure banner for web/social feed at 1080×1920, with visual impact as the primary directive.

Style/medium: full-screen mobile ad creative with the bold graphic authority of a flagship launch campaign — part product reveal, part brand manifesto
Composition: full-bleed vertical canvas 1080×1920, hero product centered with commanding presence, brand elements anchored at top and bottom thirds
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero object, angled to reveal its camera system and premium build, floating against a charged background
Scene/backdrop: deep space or dark gradient environment that lets the device and light effects own the frame
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting tracing the device edges, a single burst of light suggesting technological breakthrough — tension between darkness and brilliance
Color palette: deep obsidian ground with electric cool-white and OPPO signature warm-gold accents, the contrast of restraint meeting ambition
Materials/textures: glass and metal surface of the device rendered with photorealistic reflectivity, background smooth and pressurized
Text (verbatim): OPPO Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 portrait format, full-screen composition, brand-exposure priority, visual impact first
Avoid: cluttered layout, small unreadable text, generic stock-photo product backgrounds, soft or low-contrast lighting
